name: Pharma Speaker Program — Planning
description: Plan a speaker program for an internal pharma audience. Captures product, topic, date, speaker, and venue with compliance filtering at each step.
agent_guidelines: You are an internal program planning assistant. Walk the user through each section conversationally. Use compare_options when helping them weigh choices for product, speaker, or venue. Use recommend_options when they ask for your suggestion. Use the venue lookup tools (Google Places, Yelp) when they want to research a venue not in our compliant list.
helpful_context: This intake form drives early-stage planning of pharma speaker programs. Compliance gates apply at every step: only currently-certified speakers, compliance-approved topics, and approved venues are shown. The intake team reviews submissions within one business day and follows up with logistics. Typical lead time is 4-6 weeks; programs requiring less than 2 weeks need manager approval.
tips: Speakers shown after the user picks a product are filtered to those currently certified on that product. Expired certifications drop them off the list.
Topics are filtered to compliance-approved options for the chosen product.
Venues are filtered to those with current compliance approval; capacity filter narrows to venues large enough for the expected audience.
Use recommend_options on speakers to surface the top picks ranked by tier and recent event activity.

fields.label: Your Email
fields.prompt_hint: What email should we use to reach you?

sections.title: Product & Topic
sections.helpful_context: Pick the product first; the topic list filters down to compliance-approved topics for that product.

fields.label: Product
fields.prompt_hint: Which product is the program about?
fields.helpful_context: Active products only. The selected product drives which topics and speakers are eligible.

fields.label: Topic
fields.prompt_hint: Which topic should the speaker cover?
fields.helpful_context: Compliance-approved topics for the selected product.

fields.label: Target Date
fields.prompt_hint: What date are you targeting? Must be at least 14 days out.
fields.helpful_context: Standard recruitment lead time is 4-6 weeks. The 14-day minimum is a hard floor; tighter timelines need manager sign-off.

fields.label: Alternate Date (preferred)
fields.prompt_hint: If your target date doesn't work for the speaker, what's your second choice?

fields.label: Alternate Date (backup)
fields.prompt_hint: Any other backup date you'd accept?

sections.title: Speaker
sections.helpful_context: Only currently-certified speakers for the selected product appear here. Sorted by tier and recent event activity — Tier 1 / high-activity speakers are at the top.

fields.label: Primary Speaker
fields.prompt_hint: Who would you like to invite?
fields.helpful_context: Speakers must be active AND currently certified on the chosen product. Suggest using recommend_options if the user wants a recommendation.

fields.label: Include a backup speaker?
fields.prompt_hint: Would you like to identify a backup speaker in case your primary isn't available?

fields.label: Backup Speaker
fields.prompt_hint: Who would be your backup choice?

sections.title: Venue
sections.helpful_context: Use the venue lookup tools (Google Places, Yelp) if the user wants to research a venue not in our approved list — but only OUR compliant venues can ultimately be selected for the booking.

fields.label: Expected attendees
fields.prompt_hint: How many people are you expecting?
fields.helpful_context: This filters the venue list to spaces with sufficient capacity.

fields.label: Primary Venue
fields.prompt_hint: Which venue would you like to use?
fields.helpful_context: Compliance-approved venues with capacity ≥ expected attendees. Suggest compare_options to weigh location vs amenities.

fields.label: Include a backup venue?
fields.prompt_hint: Want to pick a backup venue in case the primary isn't available?

fields.label: Most important factor

options.label: Date — locked-in target date is critical
Speaker — specific speaker is the priority
Venue — specific venue / location is the priority

fields.prompt_hint: If we have to make tradeoffs, what matters most?
fields.helpful_context: Used by the operations team to prioritize when the requested combination isn't fully available.

fields.label: Operations follow-up call needed
fields.prompt_hint: Do you want the ops team to call you to discuss this request?

fields.label: Phone number for follow-up
fields.prompt_hint: What's the best number to reach you?

completion.confirmation_message: Thank you — your speaker program request has been submitted. The intake team has been notified and will follow up within one business day. You'll receive a copy of this submission at your email.
